$comment: Read by the companion plugin's nothing_loose PreToolUse hook via $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR (the hook FAILS OPEN if this file is absent/unreadable). allow_write = globs where the agent may Write/Edit; anything else (e.g. a NEW loose file at the repo root) is denied — that is the 'nothing loose' guard. Secret files (.env, *.pem, *.key, id_*) are blocked separately by the env_protect hook. Add a path here if your project needs a new top-level location.
